dialog.title: What's an Instant App?
dialog.content: Instant Apps deliver a native experience without the need for a full app download, harnessing superior device signal detection for precise identity checks. Unlike web platforms, they offer a swifter and more intuitive ID document flow, ensuring efficient selfie and doc uploads, all while maintaining a consistent and reliable user experience.
dialog.demo: Here’s a demo so you can try it yourself:
dialog.instructions: Use your camera app or QR code reader on your phone.
dialog.disclaimer: This is just a preview and no real data will be collected.

dialog.title: What's an App Clip?
dialog.content: App Clip deliver a native experience without the need for a full app download, harnessing superior device signal detection for precise identity checks. Unlike web platforms, they offer a swifter and more intuitive ID document flow, ensuring efficient selfie and doc uploads, all while maintaining a consistent and reliable user experience.
dialog.demo: Here’s a demo so you can try it yourself:
dialog.instructions: Use your camera app or QR code reader on your phone.
dialog.disclaimer: This is just a preview and no real data will be collected.

header.title: Playbooks
header.subtitle: Playbooks help companies onboard users to match your needs. Prescriptive yet custom to give you our guidance while recognizing this is not a one-size fits all solution.

auth.title: Auth
auth.description: Authentication allows your users to create credentials to sign up/log in to your platform
auth.disabled-tooltip: You are not configured to create production Auth playbooks. Feel free to continue in sandbox, or contact us to enable this feature.

kyc.title: Onboard people
kyc.description: Know Your Customer (KYC) is the obligation of banks, businesses, and other financial institutions to identify and authenticate a person's identity before doing business with them.
kyc.disabled-tooltip: You are not configured to create production KYC playbooks. Feel free to continue in sandbox, or contact us to enable this feature.

kyb.title: Onboard businesses and their beneficial owners
kyb.description: Know Your Business (KYB) is the obligation to verify the identity of any entity that you do business with.
kyb.disabled-tooltip: You are not configured to create production KYB playbooks. Feel free to continue in sandbox, or contact us to enable this feature.

doc-only.title: Document only
doc-only.description: Users will upload and validate ID documents (passport, driver’s license, etc.), optionally collect a selfie to match the document, and custom documents like proof-of-address, proof-of-SSN, etc.
doc-only.disabled-tooltip: You are not configured to create production Document only playbooks. Feel free to continue in sandbox, or contact us to enable this feature.
